title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Don Bosco Tech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Don Bosco Tech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Curriculum Developer in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!
